COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.Title: Compendium Merger
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.ScopeHint: Merges Item and Actor compendiums, and only Items/Spells/Monsters/Vehicles for now — Item feats/classes/subclasses/backgrounds/species and Actor characters/groups are left alone and skipped. Merged Items are sorted into Weapons/Armor/Equipment/Consumables/Tools/Loot/Containers folders, Merged Spells into a folder per spell level, and Merged Monsters into a folder per Challenge Rating or creature type (your choice below). Merged Vehicles aren't sorted into folders yet.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.PriorityHint: Each category below has its own independent list of source compendiums and priority order — a source that's great for spells isn't necessarily the one you want winning for monsters. Check the ones to include per category and order them by priority: if the same name shows up in more than one checked compendium within a category, the one closer to the top wins. Drag isn't supported — use the arrows to reorder.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.FilterEmptySources: Only show compendiums where this content type is the majority (slower to load, but hides packs that only have a stray matching item or two)
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.NoItemSources: No Item compendiums are available. Enable some under your world's Compendium Packs settings first.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.NoActorSources: No Actor compendiums are available. Enable some under your world's Compendium Packs settings first.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.RebuildWarning: Running the merge completely wipes and rebuilds the "Merged Items", "Merged Spells", "Merged Monsters", and "Merged Vehicles" compendiums from your checked sources. Any manual edits made directly inside those compendiums will be lost — edit the sources instead, then re-run.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.MergeComplete: Merge complete: {items} items, {spells} spells, {monsters} monsters, {vehicles} vehicles.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.Warnings.NoSourcesChec: Check at least one source compendium in at least one category before running the merge.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.Warnings.MergeFailed: The merge failed — check the browser console (F12) for details.
